A document with an author max-width

This is a long paragraph of ordinary body text whose author has set a max-width on its wrapper so the reading column stays narrow and centred, exactly like a real site that uses the classic max-width plus auto-margins reading-column idiom instead of letting the text run edge to edge across a very wide browser window like this one.

A second paragraph continues the same author-narrowed prose so that we can observe where the right edge of the text column falls and confirm the author max-width keeps the line length comfortable instead of running the full window width.
